author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Add GeluApproximate enum (None=exact erf, Tanh=PyTorch tanh approx, Sigmoid=existing 1.702 fast approx). Update gelu() to accept mode, update GeluBackward to store mode and compute correct derivative per mode, update nn::GELU to accept approximate param, update all callers. GPU kernels stay sigmoid-only for now with CPU fallback for other modes.
